'''gashuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacuism|vacuism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-sh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacuism|vacuism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gashuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæshiwith|gæshiwith]] || [[word:gæshiwij|gæshiwij]] || [[word:gæshiwish|gæshiwish]] || [[word:gæshiwi|gæshiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gashushuwuth|gashushuwuth]] || [[word:gashushuwuj|gashushuwuj]] || [[word:gashushuwush|gashushuwush]] || [[word:gashushuwu|gashushuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gashuwuth|gashuwuth]] || [[word:gashuwuj|gashuwuj]] || [[word:gashuwush|gashuwush]] || [[word:gashuwu|gashuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gashufwuth|gashufwuth]] || [[word:gashufwuj|gashufwuj]] || [[word:gashufwush|gashufwush]] || [[word:gashufwuf|gashufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gashuwuthu|gashuwuthu]] || [[word:gashuwuju|gashuwuju]] || [[word:gashuwushu|gashuwushu]] || [[word:gashuwuku|gashuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gashuwuth|gashuwuth]] || [[word:gashuwuj|gashuwuj]] || [[word:gashuwush|gashuwush]] || [[word:gashuwu|gashuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gashuwuthul|gashuwuthul]] || [[word:gashuwujul|gashuwujul]] || [[word:gashuwushul|gashuwushul]] || [[word:gashuwukul|gashuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gashuwuthuthu|gashuwuthuthu]] || [[word:gashuwujuju|gashuwujuju]] || [[word:gashuwushushu|gashuwushushu]] || [[word:gashuwuku|gashuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gashuwuthun|gashuwuthun]] || [[word:gashuwujun|gashuwujun]] || [[word:gashuwushun|gashuwushun]] || [[word:gashuwukun|gashuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gashuwuthuoro|gashuwuthuoro]] || [[word:gashuwujuoro|gashuwujuoro]] || [[word:gashuwushuoro|gashuwushuoro]] || [[word:gashuwukuoro|gashuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
